elements.title: lang::report_page_101_block_1_element_1_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_base.*,
       CASE
         WHEN COALESCE(kbi_base.course_lastaccess, 0) = 0 THEN 'High'
         WHEN kbi_base.days_without_access >= 30 AND kbi_base.progress_percent < 50 THEN 'High'
         WHEN kbi_base.gradepass > 0 AND kbi_base.finalgrade IS NOT NULL AND kbi_base.finalgrade < kbi_base.gradepass THEN 'High'
         WHEN kbi_base.days_without_access >= 14 OR kbi_base.progress_percent < 25 THEN 'Medium'
         ELSE 'Low'
       END AS risk_level,
       CASE
         WHEN COALESCE(kbi_base.course_lastaccess, 0) = 0 THEN 'No course access'
         WHEN kbi_base.days_without_access >= 30 AND kbi_base.progress_percent < 50 THEN 'Long inactivity and low progress'
         WHEN kbi_base.gradepass > 0 AND kbi_base.finalgrade IS NOT NULL AND kbi_base.finalgrade < kbi_base.gradepass THEN 'Grade below pass mark'
         WHEN kbi_base.days_without_access >= 14 THEN 'Recent inactivity'
         WHEN kbi_base.progress_percent < 25 THEN 'Low activity progress'
         ELSE 'Monitor'
       END AS risk_reason
FROM (
SELECT CONCAT(kbi_students.userid, '-', kbi_students.courseid) AS id,
       kbi_students.userid,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_c.id AS courseid,
       kbi_c.fullname AS course,
       kbi_enrol.enrolled_at,
       COALESCE(kbi_la.timeaccess, 0) AS course_lastaccess,
       CASE
         WHEN COALESCE(kbi_la.timeaccess, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE DATEDIFF(NOW(), FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_la.timeaccess))
       END AS days_without_access,
       COALESCE(kbi_total.total_activities, 0) AS total_activities,
       COALESCE(kbi_done.completed_activities, 0) AS completed_activities,
       CASE
         WHEN COALESCE(kbi_total.total_activities, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND((COALESCE(kbi_done.completed_activities, 0) / kbi_total.total_activities) * 100, 2)
         ELSE 0
       END AS progress_percent,
       ROUND(kbi_grade.finalgrade, 2) AS finalgrade,
       ROUND(kbi_grade.grade_percent, 2) AS grade_percent,
       ROUND(kbi_grade.gradepass, 2) AS gradepass
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT kbi_ra.userid,
                kbi_ctx.instanceid AS courseid
FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
       JOIN mdl_role kbi_r ON kbi_r.id = kbi_ra.roleid
       JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
WHERE kbi_r.shortname = 'student') kbi_students
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_students.userid
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_students.courseid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ue.userid,
       kbi_e.courseid,
       MIN(kbi_ue.id) AS enrolmentid,
       COALESCE(MIN(NULLIF(kbi_ue.timestart, 0)), MIN(kbi_ue.timecreated)) AS enrolled_at,
       MAX(kbi_ue.timeend) AS enrol_timeend
FROM mdl_enrol kbi_e
       JOIN mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue ON kbi_ue.enrolid = kbi_e.id
WHERE kbi_e.status = 0
  AND kbi_ue.status = 0
  AND (kbi_ue.timeend = 0 OR kbi_ue.timeend > UNIX_TIMESTAMP())
GROUP BY kbi_ue.userid, kbi_e.courseid) kbi_enrol ON kbi_enrol.userid = kbi_students.userid AND kbi_enrol.courseid = kbi_students.courseid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user_lastaccess kbi_la ON kbi_la.userid = kbi_students.userid AND kbi_la.courseid = kbi_students.courseid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cm.course,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_cm.id) AS total_activities
FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm
WHERE kbi_cm.deletioninprogress = 0
  AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
  AND kbi_cm.completion > 0
GROUP BY kbi_cm.course) kbi_total ON kbi_total.course = kbi_students.courseid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cm.course,
       kbi_cmc.userid,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid) AS completed_activities
FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm
       JOIN mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc ON kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id
WHERE kbi_cm.deletioninprogress = 0
  AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
  AND kbi_cm.completion > 0
  AND kbi_cmc.completionstate IN (1, 2)
GROUP BY kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid) kbi_done ON kbi_done.course = kbi_students.courseid AND kbi_done.userid = kbi_students.userid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_gi.courseid,
       kbi_gg.userid,
       kbi_gi.gradepass,
       kbi_gi.grademax,
       kbi_gg.finalgrade,
       CASE
         WHEN kbi_gi.grademax > 0 AND kbi_gg.finalgrade IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((kbi_gg.finalgrade / kbi_gi.grademax) * 100, 2)
         ELSE NULL
       END AS grade_percent
FROM mdl_grade_items kbi_gi
       JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_gg ON kbi_gg.itemid = kbi_gi.id
WHERE kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course') kbi_grade ON kbi_grade.courseid = kbi_students.courseid AND kbi_grade.userid = kbi_students.userid
WHERE kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username <> 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
) kbi_base
WHERE COALESCE(kbi_base.course_lastaccess, 0) = 0
   OR kbi_base.days_without_access >= 14
   OR kbi_base.progress_percent < 25
   OR (kbi_base.gradepass > 0 AND kbi_base.finalgrade IS NOT NULL AND kbi_base.finalgrade < kbi_base.gradepass)
ORDER BY FIELD(risk_level, 'High', 'Medium', 'Low'), kbi_base.days_without_access DESC, kbi_base.progress_percent ASC, kbi_base.course, kbi_base.lastname
